about-description: Hands-on data professional with 3+ years of experience transforming high-volume, messy datasets into reliable pipelines, scalable models, and actionable insights.
about-origin-content: This passion started with small prediction games in daily life, like guessing the real metro time or the length of a café line. Each wrong guess pushed me to dig deeper into patterns, turning a simple habit into a lasting drive for analysis and prediction.
about-work-content: I build end-to-end ETL/ELT workflows, design scalable relational schemas, and deliver analytics that empower finance, operations, and product teams.
about-outside-content: Outside work I enjoy sport shooting, guitar & DJing, and chess.
about-summary: Hands-on Data Analyst with 3 years of experience turning complex, high-volume data into trusted pipelines, robust models, and clear business insight.
skills-description: Expert in Python, advanced SQL, and modern BI tools. I build end-to-end ETL/ELT workflows, design scalable schemas, and surface analytics for finance, operations, and product teams.
resume-summary-text: Hands-on Data Analyst with 3 years of experience turning complex, high-volume data into trusted pipelines, robust models, and clear business insight.
portfolio-description: Here are some of my machine learning and data visualization projects, built as a Data Engineer.
portfolio-item1-desc: Reproduction of the QuickDraw game: free-hand drawing app with real-time pattern recognition. Front-end in React, back-end in Flask, and ML model for inference.
portfolio-item2-desc: Web application for library management: user administration, tracking dashboard, and full features of a connected library system.
portfolio-item3-desc: Personal project analyzing a large volume of sales data 📈.
portfolio-item4-desc: Project in partnership with the Loire department 🌍 to analyze and monitor pipe conditions and water leaks.
portfolio-item5-desc: Personal project to track Air France flight data in real time ✈️.
portfolio-item6-desc: Personal project to monitor real-time performance of my favorite team, McLaren 🏎️.
portfolio-item7-desc: Tableau project combining current analysis and McLaren's historical legacy (1980s–90s).
testimonial1-text: I am really happy with the work done! He took the time to understand my needs and when he did, he delivered flawlessly. I will definitely work with Tristan again soon. Thanks!
testimonial2-text: He has excellent communication and comprehension skills, as well as the ability to analyze and carry out tasks. He has expanded his knowledge of data management in the business, and learned to identify and extract valuable KPIs.

resume-exp1-bullet1: Built Python and T-SQL jobs to ingest ERP, finance, and CRM data into a central SQL Server warehouse, improving data availability for analytics by 30%.
resume-exp1-bullet2: Created ER diagrams and documentation standardizing reporting tables across production, sales, and finance.
resume-exp1-bullet3: Developed an XGBoost time-series model improving Sales & Operations Planning accuracy to 75%.
resume-exp1-bullet4: Built margin analysis tools identifying 10+ low-ROI projects per quarter, guiding resource reallocation.
resume-exp1-bullet5: Published interactive Power BI dashboards with live SQL connections, providing executives with intraday KPIs.
resume-exp2-bullet1: Integrated Odoo ERP, automating data flows and reducing manual processing by 40%.
resume-exp2-bullet2: Built SQL-driven KPIs and dashboards for inventory and capacity planning.
